title: [Snyk Code] Command Injection
description:
## Command Injection

**Severity:** medium
**Project:** `AnthusAI/Virtuus`
**File:** `tools/run_ec2_from_params.py`
**Location:** line 63, column 9 to line 63, column 30
**Classes:** CWE-CWE-78
### Snippet (tools/run_ec2_from_params.py:61-65)
```
  61 |     print("Running:", " ".join(shlex.quote(c) for c in cmd))
  62 |     try:
  63 |         subprocess.check_call(cmd)
  64 |     except subprocess.CalledProcessError as exc:  # noqa: BLE001
  65 |         print("EC2 runner failed. Did you install boto3 and configure AWS credentials?")
```

**Issue Key:** 2df9abcd-9b07-4158-ab45-adf6ad64c61d

### Details
Command Injection

**Fix:** Review and remediate in code.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Current stance: dismiss. subprocess.check_call(cmd) where cmd is a list built from a developer-controlled JSON params file. shell=False (default). Line 61 already uses shlex.quote() for display, showing awareness. No shell injection vector. Pending triple-check before formal dismissal.
